headline: Is Blackstone Inc. (BX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is BX a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Blackstone Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BX. Blackstone Inc.’s share was trading at $121.65 as of April 24th. BX’s trailing and forward P/E were 31.19 and 19.05 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Blackstone […]
